# Identity Guidelines

This skill must align designs with visual direction from project identity assets:

- `docs/identity/logo.png`
- `docs/identity/colorShcema.png`
- `docs/identity/cards.png`
- `docs/identity/pageElements.png`
- `docs/identity/pageElements2.png`
- `docs/identity/pageExample1.png`
- `docs/identity/pageExample2.png`

## Mandatory Rules
- Keep public page copy in Czech language.
- Preserve Czech diacritics in all content edits.
- Use brand palette consistently; avoid introducing unrelated color systems.
- Maintain strong text contrast against backgrounds.
- Prefer existing component primitives from `src/components`.

## Design Decisions Checklist
- Color choice matches identity palette
- Typography hierarchy is clear and intentional
- Spacing and section rhythm are consistent
- Cards and callouts reflect brand visual language
- Decorative elements are subtle and purposeful
- Mobile layout remains readable and usable

## Notes
- File name `colorShcema.png` is intentionally referenced as-is from repository.
- If identity files are updated, refresh this reference list.
